heart_line.length_long: You freely express your emotions and feelings, and have a long and curvy love life.
heart_line.length_short: You have less interest in romance and may be more reserved.
heart_line.curvature_curved: You are caring, understanding, and expressive with your emotions.
heart_line.curvature_straight: You have a good handle on your emotions and may be more sensitive and realistic.

head_line.length_long: Your thinking is clear, focused, and intricate.
head_line.length_short: You tend to prefer physical achievements over mental ones.
head_line.curvature_curved: You are creative and have an inclination towards literature and fantasy.
head_line.curvature_straight: You think realistically and are very down-to-earth and logical.

life_line.length_long: You will experience an abundance of vitality and energy in your life.
life_line.length_short: You may have lower energy levels or prefer a less strenuous life.
life_line.curvature_curved: You are a go-getter with enthusiasm for life and adventure.
life_line.curvature_straight: You are more likely to take life as it is handed to you, with a steady approach.
